overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia jogging along a foggy dirt path through grasslands at night. The atmospheric scene features cool blue-green lighting with mist rolling through the fields, and a wooden fence appears along the left side of the path as the character progresses.

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging steadily along the dirt path through the misty grassland, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
tall green grass covering the ground on both sides of the path
dark silhouette of forest trees against the night sky
dark blue cloudy sky with atmospheric fog

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a narrow dirt path through open grasslands at night. The scene is enveloped in atmospheric fog with a dark blue sky overhead and distant trees marking the horizon. The environment is empty and quiet, with only the sound of footsteps on the trail.

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues jogging forward as the path passes alongside a wooden fence on the left

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence posts running parallel to the dirt path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues along the path, a rustic wooden fence appears on the left side, running parallel to the trail. The fog persists across the grasslands, and the path remains clearly visible as it winds through the rural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate dirt path that transitions from an open, misty expanse into a more structured rural landscape. It begins with Geralt running through empty grasslands under a dark blue night sky, where dense atmospheric fog obscures the distant horizon. As he progresses, the camera maintains its steady pace through the quiet environment, keeping the narrow trail centered amidst the rolling mist. The scene then shifts as a rustic wooden fence emerges on the left, running parallel to the path and adding a sense of boundary to the previously open fields. Finally, the camera continues to follow the winding trail as it cuts through the foggy rural terrain.
